title: OV's Legacy: Cat Armor
description: Vanilla like armor for your loyal cat companions!
body:
![Mod Title Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f26fadb914f4d2f18e53de5584824b46160cd1c.png)

Did you feel left out when the Wolf Armor dropped? Did you want your Cat to be just as special?</br>
Then fear not! Cat Armor is here to help your fierce feline out!

## Introducing: Cat Armor
Craftable by putting a **salmon** into your normal Wolf Armor recipe:</br></br>
![Cat Armor Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8f314c024c6d7d389aefd204bc67eec0c9e4da.png)

You can even **dye** your armor to your liking!</br></br>
![Cat Armor Dye Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dbe5c978e7111d097f86a105160e7f8cdf001e2.png)
